$description: Responsive breakpoint tokens — canonical 4-tier system aligned with M3 window size classes. CSS @media cannot use custom properties; duplicate raw px and comment the token name.

compact.$description: Compact — mobile: single column, bottom nav. @media (max-width: 599px)

medium.$description: Medium — tablet: collapsed sidebar, 2-column layout. @media (min-width: 600px) and (max-width: 904px)

expanded.$description: Expanded — desktop: full sidebar, multi-column content. @media (min-width: 905px)

wide.$description: Wide — ultrawide: detail panels, wider grids. @media (min-width: 1240px)
